title: eugenia doligophylla
intro: Eugenia doligophylla, also known as the Pigeon Plum or Wild Plum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrtaceae. It is native to tropical regions and has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Eugenia doligophylla include its ability to aid in the treatment of digestive issues, fever reduction, and as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. Eugenia doligophylla can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or infusion, and has also been used in traditional medicine to make ointments and salves for topical application.
